retrieved_result: The Finger to Nose Test is a description of a field sobriety test, unrelated to Docker or software setup.
Decision_Reason: Content is about field sobriety testing and has no relevance to Docker setup for beginners.
combined_text_for_llm: The Finger to Nose Test "The finger to nose test is a common field sobriety test (FST) that some law enforcement officers administer in order to assess whether a DUI suspect is under the influence of alcohol and/or drugs. 1During the finger to nose test, the DUI suspect is required to: Bring the tip of the index finger up

history.title: The Finger to Nose Test
history.description: "The finger to nose test is a common field sobriety test (FST) that some law enforcement officers administer in order to assess whether a DUI suspect is under the influence of alcohol and/or drugs. 1During the finger to nose test, the DUI suspect is required to: Bring the tip of the index finger up
